Partners

Partners

We cooperate with international companies specialized in advanced materials, technical components, and machine tools.

ALBROMET - Germany

Division: MDU

Aluminum-bronze and high-conductivity copper alloys for tools, molds, and technical components.

https://www.albromet.de

NEW-FORM TOOLS - Canada

Division: MDU

Tube/profile cut-off blades with dedicated solutions for high-productivity cutting lines.

https://www.newformtools.com

COORSTEK - USA

Division: MACSI

Advanced ceramic materials for high-performance industrial applications.

https://www.coorstek.com

STEINHAUS - Germany

Division: MACSI

Precision filtration solutions and laminated belts for tunnel furnaces.

https://www.steinhaus-gmbh.de

ULBRICH - USA

Division: MACSI

Strips, sheets and wires in special metals for advanced industrial processes.

https://www.ulbrich.com

HARALD PIHL - Sweden

Division: MACSI

Wide availability of special alloys and titanium for critical applications.

https://www.haraldpihl.com

FELSS GROUP - Germany

Division: DIVMAC

Forming and machining technologies for tubular and metal components.

https://www.felss.com

WEIL-TECHNOLOGY - Germany

Division: DIVMAC

Automated lines and systems for forming, cutting and joining.

https://www.weil-engineering.de

WF MASCHINENBAU - Germany

Division: DIVMAC

Flow-forming machines for transmission components and sheet deformation.

https://www.wf-maschinenbau.com

LESSMANN - Germany

Division: DIVMAC

Special industrial brushes for finishing, deburring, and automated processes.

https://www.lessmann.com
